headline: Sean Steur
body: Newcastle United confirm Sean Steur has joined from Ajax in a deal worth up to £23m. The 18-year-old has signed a five-year contract.🇳🇱
raw_text:
Newcastle United confirm Sean Steur has joined from Ajax in a deal worth up to £23m.

The 18-year-old has signed a five-year contract.🇳🇱
text:

The 18-year-old has signed a five-year contract.🇳🇱
